languages.text: "То, что происходит — ваш последний долг перед династией. Передо мной".

traits.locale_text: "То, что происходит — ваш последний долг перед династией. Передо мной".

languages.text: "What is happening now is your final duty to the dynasty. To me."
languages.original_text: "То, что происходит — ваш последний долг перед династией. Передо мной".

traits.locale_text: "What is happening now is your final duty to the dynasty. To me."
"What is happening now is your final duty to the dynasty. To me."
"What is happening now is your final duty to the dynasty. To me."
"What is happening now is your final duty to the dynasty. To me."
"What is happening now is your final duty to the dynasty. To me."

languages.text: "Was jetzt passiert, ist Eure letzte Pflicht gegenüber der Dynastie. Und mir."
languages.original_text: "What is happening now is your final duty to the dynasty. To me."

traits.locale_text: "Was jetzt passiert, ist Eure letzte Pflicht gegenüber der Dynastie. Und mir."

languages.text: “眼下这件事，就是你为王朝尽的最后一次职责。也是为我。”
languages.original_text: "What is happening now is your final duty to the dynasty. To me."

traits.locale_text: “眼下这件事，就是你为王朝尽的最后一次职责。也是为我。”

languages.text: « Ce qui arrive est votre ultime devoir envers la dynastie. Envers moi. »
languages.original_text: "What is happening now is your final duty to the dynasty. To me."

traits.locale_text: « Ce qui arrive est votre ultime devoir envers la dynastie. Envers moi. »

languages.text: «Lo que ocurre es que estás prestando un último servicio a la dinastía. A mí».
languages.original_text: "What is happening now is your final duty to the dynasty. To me."

traits.locale_text: «Lo que ocurre es que estás prestando un último servicio a la dinastía. A mí».

languages.text: "Şu an olan şey; hanedanlığa, bana karşı son vazifendir."
languages.original_text: "What is happening now is your final duty to the dynasty. To me."

traits.locale_text: "Şu an olan şey; hanedanlığa, bana karşı son vazifendir."

languages.text: 「今起きていることは、君が王朝に、そして私にもたらす最後の義務だ」
languages.original_text: "What is happening now is your final duty to the dynasty. To me."

traits.locale_text: 「今起きていることは、君が王朝に、そして私にもたらす最後の義務だ」
